channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Scandals and Controversies in the Madlanga Commission Hearings
item.description: The Madlanga commission, established to investigate alleged misconduct, has faced several unexpected and controversial moments that have shaped its proceedings. One incident involved SABC reporter Nat...

item.title: Global Oil Prices Fall as Markets Show Mixed Reactions and Tech Sector Faces Challenges
item.description: Crude oil prices fell Monday as OPEC+ agreed to boost output targets from August, with Brent crude dropping 0.47% to $71.78 per barrel and U.S. WTI crude falling 0.29% to $68.49. Tankers continued thr...

item.title: Washington Nationals Lose to Pirates After Struggles with Cavalli and Bullpen
item.description: The Washington Nationals suffered an 11-5 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates in a series-clinching game, marked by struggles from starting pitcher Cade Cavalli and a strained bullpen. Cavalli's abbreviate...

item.title: Menswear Trends for Autumn/Winter 2026 Highlight Nostalgia and Texture
item.description: The autumn/winter 2026 menswear season showcased a deliberate blend of retro influences and modern innovation, with designers drawing heavily from the 1970s and 1980s to create a nostalgic yet forward...

item.title: Copyright and AI: Artists Fight for Ownership in the Age of Technology
item.description: Anna Funder, an Australian author, warns that major US technology companies are exploiting creative works without consent or payment, using artificial intelligence to generate profits. She argues that...

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Turbulent 1960s Journey from Struggles to Stardom
item.description: This article explores the formative years of Sylvester Stallone during the 1960s, a period marked by personal challenges and pivotal life decisions. Born in 1946, Stallone faced physical complications...

item.title: Tanzania Reimposes Rally Ban Amid Political Repression Fears
item.description: Tanzania has reimposed a ban on political rallies, marking the second time in a decade that such gatherings have been restricted. President Samia Hassan, who previously lifted the ban in 2023 as part ...

item.title: Ethnic Violence in Manipur Leaves Woman and Daughter Injured, Homes Destroyed
item.description: A 56-year-old Kuki woman and her eight-year-old daughter were injured in a gunfight between two armed groups in Manipur's Kangpokpi district, while at least three houses were set ablaze in a separate ...

item.title: Clerical Officer Salary Breakdown in Kenya: Grades and Allowances
item.description: The article provides a detailed breakdown of clerical officer salaries in Kenya, outlining the pay scales for different grades (from Clerical Officer II to Principal Clerical Officer) across public se...

item.title: Nigeria and Ghana sign MoU to boost maritime trade and regional cooperation
item.description: Nigeria and Ghana have signed a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to deepen maritime cooperation, boost regional trade, and accelerate Blue Economy development in West Africa. The agreement,...

item.title: Massive wildfires sweep through Portugal, Greece, and Spain with toxic smoke warnings
item.description: Wildfires have erupted across Portugal, Greece, and Spain, prompting urgent efforts to contain the blazes. In Greece, a fast-moving wildfire at a recycling plant near Thessaloniki released toxic smoke...

item.title: GoDaddy Challenges India's Domain Regulation Rules in Legal Dispute
item.description: The article discusses GoDaddy, the world's largest domain seller, challenging India's new regulations targeting fake websites that impersonate brands. The Indian court ordered measures requiring domai...

item.title: Wildfires devastate southern Europe as climate crisis intensifies
item.description: In July 2026, unprecedented wildfires have erupted across Portugal, Spain, and Greece, driven by record-breaking heatwaves and prolonged drought. The fires, which have scorched thousands of hectares, ...

item.title: Tanzania and Angola Strengthen Economic Ties Through Cooperation
item.description: Tanzania and Angola are enhancing their diplomatic relationship by prioritizing economic cooperation, aiming to expand investment opportunities, trade partnerships, and industrial collaboration. This ...

item.title: Legal challenge over national dialogue appointments as nominees seek court intervention
item.description: A legal dispute has emerged regarding the formal appointment process for participants in President Cyril Ramaphosa's national dialogue initiative. Eight applicants, including Gordon Lesley Rolls and P...

item.title: Jude Bellingham's Stellar Performance Leads England to Victory Over Mexico in World Cup Match
item.description: In a high-stakes encounter at the Azteca Stadium, England secured a crucial victory against Mexico in the 2026 World Cup qualifiers. Jude Bellingham emerged as the standout performer, delivering a mas...

item.title: Preliminary hearing begins for Tyler Robinson in Charlie Kirk murder case
item.description: Tyler Robinson, a 23-year-old man accused of assassinating Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University, is set for a week-long preliminary hearing to determine if prosecutors have...

item.title: Aero Contractors urges enhanced public-private partnership for aviation growth
